channel.title: directx9 on Brain=f(X)?
channel.description: Recent content in directx9 on Brain=f(X)?

item.title: Deferred Shading Method in DirectX9
item.description:
In the latest work, we need the engine to support large number of lights. As we all know, the classic way built in DirectX9 is not a reasonable method to do that because of efficiency, so deferred shading way becomes the choice.

Adding new features in an existent system is never an easy thing. You’ll encounter tons of ceilings and pits. After the feature finished I decided to build a simple project just for deferred shading method itself. That why this blog is here.

ps. The project example is on the github, enjoy it with the blog. :)
